title: BeiJing Subway Sign
description: BeiJing Subway Station Name Sign    Designed By sraxc    Powered by JCM,Based on the MTR4.0.0+ module
body:
REQUEST MOD:  MTR4.0.0+ (Minecraft Transit Railway) ; JCM2.0.0+ (Joban Client Mod)

 

It simulates the signboards of the Beijing Subway and has the function of automatically obtaining the current station name and current line color information and displaying them on the signboard. Please modify this resource on the Pid screen of JCM2.0.0+.!

![beijing subway station sign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9762807364f769d12f20520abb776b86fff0df3_0.webp)
